info.description:
QDHub - Quantitative Data Hub Management System API
Provides metadata management, automatic table creation, data synchronization, and workflow orchestration.
info.title: QDHub API

post.description: Create a new API metadata entry

get.description: Get details of a specific API by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific API metadata entry

delete.description: Delete a specific API metadata entry

get.description: Get a list of all registered data sources

post.description: Register a new data source with its connection details

get.description: Get details of a specific data source by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific data source

delete.description: Delete a specific data source and its associated metadata

get.description: Get all API metadata for a specific data source
Get all API categories for a data source

post.description: Parse and import API metadata from the data source documentation

get.description: Get token information for a data source (token value is not returned for security)

post.description: Set or update the authentication token for a data source

delete.description: Delete the authentication token for a data source

get.description: Get a list of all configured data stores

post.description: Create a new quantitative data store configuration

get.description: Get details of a specific data store by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific data store

delete.description: Delete a specific data store configuration

get.description: Get all table schemas for a data store

post.description: Generate a table schema from API metadata

get.description: Get details of a specific table schema

delete.description: Drop a table from the data store

post.description: Create a table in the data store based on the schema
Synchronize schema status with the data store
Test the connection to a data store

get.description: Get details of a specific sync execution

post.description: Cancel a running sync execution

get.description: Get a list of workflow instances, optionally filtered by status
Get details of a specific workflow instance

post.description: Cancel a running or paused workflow instance
Pause a running workflow instance

get.description: Get the progress status of a workflow instance

post.description: Resume a paused workflow instance
Retry a failed task instance
Synchronize a workflow instance with the workflow engine

get.description: Get all task instances for a workflow instance
Get data type mapping rules

post.description: Create a data type mapping rule

get.description: Get a list of all sync jobs

post.description: Create a sync job to synchronize data from an API to a data store

get.description: Get details of a specific sync job by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific sync job

post.description: Disable a sync job to stop scheduled execution
Enable a sync job for scheduled execution

get.description: Get a list of all executions for a sync job

post.description: Manually trigger execution of a sync job
Handle callback from workflow engine for sync execution (internal use)

get.description: Get a list of all workflow definitions, optionally filtered by category

post.description: Create a new workflow definition
Synchronize all workflow instances with the workflow engine

get.description: Get details of a specific workflow definition by ID

put.description: Update details of a specific workflow definition

post.description: Disable a workflow definition
Enable a workflow definition
Execute a workflow definition and create a new instance
